Short title and commencement—(1) These rules may be called the Cable Television Networks (Second Amend ment) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall cOnte into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, in rule 3, in sub-rule (3), in clause (a), for the words and figures "a fee of Rs. 50", the words and figures "a fee of Rs. 100" shall be substituted. [File No. 9/2/95-PBC] K.S. SARMA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note :—Principal notification has been published vide G.S.R. 729 (E) dated 29th September, 1994, Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapurl, New Delhl-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 . 1995 -- 2 of 2 --
